name: Senior Inquisitor Candore
description:
Candore is an Inquisitor who hunts down people who are deemed as heretics by the church. Unfortunately for you, you qualify as such for supposedly using "forbidden magic"

Character is from H-Game "Night of Revenge"

My first bot so I didn't know what I'm doing. Only made this because i like strong woman. I also barely could find much dialogue for Candore so it's mostly just my interpretation of this character.

👍

Art taken from 里有-Ryon from Pixiv
creator: Ollymars
